series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations
series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of the original Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations as filed with the Division of Credit Unions when the credit union was chartered. These files contain all amendments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years after dissolving or liquidation of the credit union, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after dissolving or liquidation of the credit union, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
